info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: 1.1001 wuyAcf~ ityasya ayaM qvit-pAWaBedaH sidDAntakOmudyAM pAWitaH nAsti parantu kzIrataraNgiRyAM dfSyate

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'evaM prayAcati tadA BAskare munisattamaH' (BA॰anu॰96.1) praSabdo'narTakaH
'sa pArijAtaM yadi na pradAsyati prayAcyamAno BavatA' (hari॰2.68.39) sAnubanDaM prArTyamAna ityarTaH syAt
'taM gatvA sahitAH sarve varaM vE samprayAcata' (BA0 vana0 1008) yAcYAyAM sAhityaM tu 'sahitAH' ityanenEvoktam tena nArTaH samA
'mftyorahaM brahmacArI yadasmi niryAcan' (aTarva0 61333) niryAcan niHSezeRa yAce
'niryAcan BUtAt puruzaM yamAya eza te rudra BAgo yaM nirayAcaTAH' (tE0 saM0 3194 5124) ukto'rTaH
'rudrAdeva paSUnniryAcyAtmane karma kurute' (tE0 saM0 5128) niryAcya yAcYA prApya
'(AyAcamAnA) rAmasya ca BavaM nityamaBavaM rAvaRasya ca' (rA0 52122)
'AyAcamAnAM duHKArtAM…daSagrIvaparABavam' (rA0 51921)
'vAgyatAM devatAgAre dadarSAyAcatIM Sriyam' (rA0 2430) AyAcatImAyAcantIM prArTayamAnAm ANABimuKye syAt
'apyasya putrAnpOtrAMSca yAcayate bfhaspatiH' (aTarva0 12438) apistiNantena na sambaDyata iti sADIyo darSanam na hyapiyAciryAcerBinnamarTamAha yAcayate yAcyAn karotItyarTaH
'atiyAcYA tu jIyeta dOrmatyAvinayena vA' (kO0 a0 31337) atiyAcYA'tyaDikanirveSasya mArgaRam
'mahyametad dadasveti tadratnamudayAcata' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 541) udayAcata balavatprArTayata bAQamavarayata
'SirasA tvaBiyAce'haM kuruzva karuRAM mayi' (rA0 210629) yAca ityevArTaH nArTo'BinA
'sagaraM cAByayAcanta sarve prAYjalayaH sTitAH' (BA0 vana0 10741) ukto'rTaH aByaBAzanteti pAWAntaram
'goBistu BakzitaM sasyaM yo naraH pratiyAcate' (yAjYa0 2161 mitAkzarAyAmudDftaM nAradavacanam) yAvanme sasyaM tava goBirBakzitaM tAvanme pratidIyatAmityaBiyukta ityarTaH
arTa upayAcYAyAm iti DAtupAWaH anopaSabdo nAntaramarTe karoti api vopetya yAcYopayAcYA syAt
'BaktilakzmIsamfdDAnAM kimanyadupayAcitam etayA vA daridrARAM kimanyadapayAcitam' (sarva0 da0 saM0 pratyaBi0) upayAcitam=yAcanam apayAcitamanizwaprArTanam
'tvayA purastAdupayAcito yaH so'yaM vawaH SyAma iti pratItaH' (raGu0 1353) upayAcitaH prArTita:
'trElokyacAriRI sA tvaM Buvi satyopayAcanA' (hari0 2250) mamedamIpsitaM kuru ahaM tvAM pUjayizyAmi taM tamupahAraM te dAsyAmItyevaMrUpA prArTanA upayAcanocyate

'tEstErapyupayAcitErupanatastanvyA sTito'pyantike' (DvanyAloke viSneSvareRa hindIvyAKyAyAM pf0 49 samudDftamutpalapAdAcAryavacanam) ukto'rTaH upayAcitEH svArTasidDO pratiSrutErarTErityarTaH itTaM ca nirUpayantyupayAcitaM tajjYAH-- dIyate yattu deveByo manorAjyasya sidDaye upayAcitakaM divyaM dohadaM tad vidurbuDAH..
'nikzepI mriyate tuByamupadAsyAmyupayAcitam' (paYcata0 114)
'upayAcitadAnena yato devA aBIzwadAH' (paYcata0 250)
'adya mayA BagavatyAH karAlAyAH prAgupayAcitaM strIratnamupahartavyam' (mAlatI0 5)
'tasyopayAcitAnyetya tatratyAH kurvate janAH tattadvAYCitasaMsidDihetostEstErupAyanEH' (kaTA0 13166).. tasyopayAcitAni kurvanti pratiSrutArTamarpayanti
'grahARAM caritaM svapno nimittAnyupayAcitam Palanti kAkatAlIyaM teByaH prAjYA na biByati' (veRI0 215 ityatrANgirovacanamityudAhftam)..
